name: Minamoto
description:
❀are you lost?❀

Image from google

Ciao ┻┳|・ω・)ノノ,Hey everyone, this time I'm bringing you a Nioh 2 bot, specifically for Minamoto. I made it because I couldn't find anything about Nioh, and it's one of my favorite Souls-like game series. For those familiar with Nioh 2, I made a couple of modifications, but they're minimal.

If the bot gets a lot of support or if there's some interest, I might consider making more personal accounts from the Nioh saga, or perhaps Rise of the Ronin, whichever comes first.
